headline: SpaceX nears $3 trillion market cap, topping Amazon and Microsoft
summary: SpaceX (SPCX) stock continues to reach new heights since its IPO last week, already breaking above $200 per share while its nearly $3 trillion market cap sets it up as a heavy hitter among Big Tech peers. Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Management chief investment strategist Tim Urbanowicz and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma discuss the FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) rally that has pushed SpaceX so high in just a few trading days. SpaceX has also completed a deal to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion.

headline: SpaceX Hits $2.5 Trillion. Retail Investors Bought as Much of It as the Entire Stock Market.
summary: Elon Musk is now worth more than three times the world's second-richest person.

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks with Open Questions
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.
